---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Essays on leadership, transitions, language, and learning to think with data."
pagetitle: "Blog - Sritanya Suresh Andal"
description: "Personal essays by Sritanya Suresh Andal on leadership, moving to Dublin, working between languages, and building an e-portfolio."
listing:
  id: posts
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  page-size: 10
  image-height: 200px
toc: false
---

[Writing, mostly to think clearly.]{.kicker}

::: {.lede}
I write to notice what I have learned. These posts track the year - the year I moved countries, switched programmes, and built the rest of this site. They are personal, and they are true.
:::

::: {#posts}
:::
